# Anton Lee

> Software Engineer & Visual Artist
> Computer Engineering — University of Waterloo
> Toronto, Canada

## Summary

Anton Lee is a Computer Engineering student at the University of Waterloo who builds at the intersection of machine learning, computer vision, medical imaging, and full-stack systems. He is a multi-time hackathon award winner, startup co-founder (YC S25 top 5% applicant), and visual artist working in oil pastel, watercolour, pencil, and origami.

## Current Focus

- Machine learning and computer vision systems
- Medical imaging software (C++, Qt, VTK/ITK) at SickKids hospital
- 3D volumetric capture and reconstruction
- Full-stack web applications

## Key Skills

Languages: Python, C/C++, C#, Java, TypeScript, Go
Frontend: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Three.js
Backend: Flask, AWS Lambda, MongoDB, PostgreSQL
ML/CV: PyTorch, TensorFlow, OpenCV, MediaPipe
Tools: Git, Docker, Jira, CMake, Qt, VTK/ITK
